title: Tensura: Reincarnated Addon
body:
# TR Addon
This mod adds new content to the Tensura: Reincarnated mod.
-[https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated)

- 3 Unique skills
- 3 Intrinsic skills
- 1 Battlewill
- New Evolution Line for slime
- Config to change starting skills of new races and many skill values


Leave a comment for any questions/suggestions, or message me on discord. -blocker315


## Slime
Slime -> Dark Slime -> Abyss Slime -> Eldritch Slime.

As a slime, using the new Abyss Core item, you will evolve into a Dark Slime. Abyss Core is crafted with 8 Demon essence and an Element Core

Dark Slime to Abyss Slime will require an awakening.

Abyss to Eldritch needs 2 million EP.

Dark Slime: Physical Attack Nullification, Pain Nullification, Possession, Demon Lord Haki

Abyss Slime: Infinite Regeneration, Universal Perception, Magic Resistance, Spiritual Attack Resistance, Darkness Attack Nullification, Outer Darkness

Eldritch Slime: Spiritual Attack Nullification

## Skills
### Unique
-Deviator: Has 1 mode, possession. Gain all skills from possessed target, and 10% chance for gaining each unique skill. Also has 1 passive, deals spiritual damage on hit, when in slot or when mastered and toggled.

-Devastator: Has 2 modes, Demonic Presence and Insta-Kill. Demonic Presence is same as Demon Lord Haki. Insta-Kill is similar to Coercion but, kills any target under 75% EP of user. Target with Spiritual attack resistance needs to be under 50% of users EP to kill. Target with Spiritual attack nullification needs to be under 25% of users EP to kill. if resisted target still gets fear. While in slot deals extra damage to equipment. While toggled gives buffs similar to Berserker, but with less armor and speed and more damage.

-Spatial Samurai: Has 2 modes, Imaginary Cleave and Space-Time Slash. Imaginary Cleave is a long range attack that deals spatial damage. Space-Time Slash attacks closest target. Both attacks have a base damage that also increases with attack damage. When mastered, damage and range is increased, and you can toggle the skill to make Imaginary cleave activate on hit when in slot.

### Intrinsic
-Outer Darkness: Intrinsic skill of Abyss Slimes. Has 2 modes and 2 passives. Darkness Coat, adds darkness damage to attacks, similar to Magic Aura. Abyss Ray, requires learning, Similar to Darkness cannon. While toggled, increases darkness attack damage. When mastered and toggled increases magicule regen. Effects are increased while Eldritch Slime.

-Material Creation: Intrinsic skill unlockable by Demons. Available to learn at 10,000 EP.
Allows creation of magic equipment. strength will increase at certain EP amounts.

-Exoskeleton: Similar to Dragon Skin but scales with EP. can't be used with armor.

### Battlewill
-Holy Demolisher Fist: Activates with extra range. Deals Physical and magic damage. When mastered deals spiritual damage and increases damage, also gives spiritual attack Nullification.

### !!!
If you want to reincarnate with the new skills or learn the battlewill, you will need to edit the Tensura: Reincarnated Config

When adding skill using commands or adding to reincarnation list use, "traddon" instead of "tensura"

-"traddon:deviator"
